mcp_mcps_status_xor.name: mcp_mcps_status_xor
mcp_mcps_status_xor.value: NOT ("extension_id" IS NOT NULL AND "in_dev" = true)

mcp_tools_owner_layer.name: mcp_tools_owner_layer
mcp_tools_owner_layer.value:
(layer = 'industry' AND owner_sector IS NOT NULL AND owner_domain IS NULL AND owner_pdt IS NULL)
        OR (layer = 'public' AND owner_sector IS NULL AND owner_domain IS NOT NULL)
